title: ジャパンカップにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the waiting room before the start of the Japan
Cup, Symboli Rudolf exchanges friendly greetings
with her younger rivals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But even when her thoughts are on the past and
the future, her sights are on the track. Today, as
ever, she will do her duty as the Emperor.
